chosen_action.title: Deliver the live StackOverflow answer packet for manual placement in the current chat
chosen_action.question_title: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?

why_this_action.summary: External directory and curator lanes are already saturated or inside live review windows, Reddit is blocked from this runtime, and the StackOverflow lane has one still-live qualified question with a reusable answer draft. Delivering the exact packet to the current chat turns the waiting asset into an executable manual placement instead of refreshing it again.
runtime_constraints: StackOverflow API cooldown active until 2026-05-24T11:24:37.256862+02:00 equivalent local retry gate from lane artifact
No first-class StackOverflow posting tool is available in this runtime

expected_outcome: A ready-to-post StackOverflow answer is in the current chat with Codeberg-first CTA, so the next manual placement can happen without more draft churn.

measurement_window.success_metric: Manual placement occurs and drives qualified evaluator traffic to Codeberg first.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If manual placement still has not happened by the review window, retire this question instead of refreshing the packet again.

live_verification.finding: The StackOverflow question is still live and search results still show it as unanswered / low-answer competition in current snippets.
